questions: What's in the Software Engineering course?
Can you explain the HND path to a London Met degree?
Is the HND equivalent to the first two years of university?
Tell me about the SE curriculum.
What subjects are included in software engineering?
What do students learn in HND SE?
What modules are taught in software engineering?
Can you tell me about the SE course structure?
What is covered in HND software engineering?
software_engineering_and_hnd.answer: The HND in Software Engineering is a 2-year vocational qualification covering programming, databases, networking, software development, and system analysis. Students can progress to the London Metropolitan University Top-up degree.

questions: Do I need ALs for Software Engineering?
What are the requirements for HND?
My son just finished OLs, can he join?
Entry criteria for London Met top-up?
Do I need maths for software engineering?
software_engineering_and_hnd.answer: Students with A/L qualifications or a recognized foundation programme can apply. HND holders can apply for the London Met Top-up programme.

questions: How long is the software engineering degree?
What is the duration of the HND?
How many years is the SE programme?
How long does the degree take?
Time required to complete the programme?
software_engineering_and_hnd.answer: The HND programme usually takes 18–24 months, while the complete BSc Top-up pathway generally takes around 3 years.

questions: How much is the total fee?
Are there monthly payment options for parents?
What are the fee payment methods?
How do I settle the course fees?
financials.answer: ESOFT offers flexible payment plans including monthly installments and semester-based payments. Discounts may be available for full upfront payments.

questions: How much does software engineering cost?
Can I get the fee structure?
financials.answer: The total fee depends on the selected programme and pathway. Students can obtain the latest fee structure from the admissions office.

questions: Missed the Jan intake, when is the next one?
What is the next batch date?
logistics_and_intakes.answer: Major intakes usually occur in January, May/June, and September/October.

questions: What is the weekly schedule like?
logistics_and_intakes.answer: ESOFT offers full-time and part-time batches with blended learning support including physical lectures and online learning resources.

questions: How many days per week are classes?
logistics_and_intakes.answer: Full-time lectures are generally conducted on weekdays, while part-time classes are held during weekends and evenings.

questions: Can I go to London Met in UK for my final year?
Is the degree recognized in England?
How do I transfer to London?
Can my child finish the degree in the UK?
Can I study in UK after HND?
Do you offer UK transfer options?
Can I complete my degree overseas?
career_and_global_mobility.answer: Students completing their HND can transfer to London Metropolitan University in the UK to complete the final year, depending on academic eligibility and visa requirements.

questions: Are there internships for SE students?
What kind of jobs can I get after this?
Does ESOFT help with finding a job?
career_and_global_mobility.answer: ESOFT supports students through career guidance programmes, internship opportunities, and industry collaborations with leading IT companies.

questions: What careers can I get after software engineering?
Can I become a software engineer?
What jobs are available after graduation?
Can I work abroad with this degree?
career_and_global_mobility.answer: Graduates can pursue careers such as Software Engineer, Web Developer, QA Engineer, Systems Analyst, Database Administrator, and IT Project Coordinator.

questions: Does the campus have a library?
What are the facilities like at Metro Campus?
campus_life.answer: ESOFT Metro Campus includes computer labs, digital learning resources, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, and student support facilities.
ESOFT provides a vibrant student environment including clubs, workshops, competitions, student events, and networking opportunities.

questions: Who is the awarding body for the BSc?
Is this a London Met degree?
Is the certificate from London Metropolitan University?
Is London Met the partner university?
university_and_recognition.answer: The degree is awarded by London Metropolitan University, UK, in partnership with ESOFT Metro Campus.

questions: Is the degree recognized by UGC?
Can I apply for government jobs?
Is London Met recognized in Sri Lanka?
Is the qualification valid in Sri Lanka?
Can I use this degree internationally?
university_and_recognition.answer: London Metropolitan University is recognized internationally and listed by the University Grants Commission (UGC) Sri Lanka as a recognized foreign university.
